title: lathyrus clymenum subvar. latifolius
intro: Lathyrus clymenum subvar. latifolius, also known as broad-leaved everlasting pea or broad-leaved sweet pea, is a subvariety of the Lathyrus clymenum plant, a perennial legume native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus clymenus include potential relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as possible antiseptic and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
